name: Deckard
description: A burst Healer who excels at preparing the battlefield before a fight and can cripple enemies with crowd control.
title: The Last Horadrim
info: As an avid scholar, Deckard Cain has dedicated his life to the pursuit of knowledge. He has been an advisor, storyteller, and friend to Sanctuary's greatest heroes, guiding them through peril time and again. When Deckard speaks, it's wise to stay awhile and listen.

Deckard.name: Healing Potion
Deckard.description: Throw a Healing Potion on the ground that heals the first allied Hero that comes in contact with it for 285 (+4% per level).  Limit 5 active Potions.

Deckard.name: Horadric Cube
Deckard.description: Release the Horadric Cube. After 0.5 seconds it explodes, dealing 80 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in the area and Slowing them by 35% for 2 seconds.

Deckard.name: Scroll Of Sealing
Deckard.description: Unfurl an enchanted scroll over 2.25 seconds, forming a triangle that deals 150 (+4% per level) damage to enemies inside and Roots them for 1.5 seconds.

Deckard.name: Stay Awhile and Listen
Deckard.description: After 1 second, Channel for 3 seconds, putting enemy Heroes in front of Deckard to Sleep while Channeling, and for 2 seconds after.  Enemies can only be put to Sleep once per cast, and Sleep's effects end instantly if they take damage.

Deckard.name: Lorenado
Deckard.description: Vector Targeting After 1 second, create a twirling tome tornado that travels towards the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals 20 (+4% per level) damage to Heroes hit.

Deckard.name: Fortitude of the Faithful
Deckard.description: When at least 1 other allied Hero is nearby, Deckard gains 10 Armor and his Basic Abilities recharge 50% faster.

1.name: Scroll of Identify
1.description: Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with Scroll of Sealing permanently increases its damage by 2.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Scroll of Sealing reveals and reduces the Armor of Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, this talent's Armor reduction effect is increased to 15 and its duration to 6 seconds.

1.name: Field Study
1.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Scroll of Sealing grants 20% Spell Power for 16 seconds, up to 40%.

1.name: Sapphire
1.description: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and its slow by 30%.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.

4.name: Potion of Shielding
4.description: Whenever an ally is healed by a Healing Potion, they gain a 140 (+4% per level) Shield for 6 seconds.

4.name: Rejuvenation Potion
4.description: Healing Potions restore 15 Mana and heal for an additional 114 (+4% per level) over 3 seconds.

4.name: Ruby
4.description: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100%  and it spawns 3 Lesser Healing Potions from each enemy Hero hit, healing allied Heroes for 250 (+4% per level) when picked up. Lesser Healing Potions last for 10 seconds.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.

7.name: Cube Mastery
7.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Scroll of Sealing from 40 to 25. Each enemy Hero hit by Horadric Cube reduces the cooldown of Scroll of Sealing by 4 seconds.

7.name: Kanai's Cube
7.description: Horadric Cube reduces Hero damage dealt by 30% for 4 seconds.

7.name: Emerald
7.description: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and have it reduce the healing received of enemy Heroes by 75% for 4 seconds.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.

10.name: Stay Awhile and Listen
10.description: After 1 second, Channel for 3 seconds, putting enemy Heroes in front of Deckard to Sleep while Channeling, and for 2 seconds after.  Enemies can only be put to Sleep once per cast, and Sleep's effects end instantly if they take damage.

10.name: Lorenado
10.description: Vector Targeting After 1 second, create a twirling tome tornado that travels towards the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals 20 (+4% per level) damage to Heroes hit.

13.name: Super Healing Potion
13.description: If a Healing Potion isn't picked up for at least 2 seconds, it heals for 100% more.  Passive: Healing Potion heals for 25% more when the target is under 50% health.

13.name: Potion of Revival
13.description: When a Healing Potion is picked up, it also heals all nearby allied Heroes for 75% of the healing amount.

13.name: Ancient Blessings
13.description: Activate Fortitude of the Faithful to empower nearby allied Hero Basic Attacks for 8 seconds, causing them to deal an additional 62 (+4% per level) damage in an area and heal for 90 (+4% per level) for each Hero hit. This effect can only occur once per second.

16.name: Scroll of Stone Curse
16.description: Scroll of Sealing deals 200% more damage when hitting at least 2 Heroes.

16.name: Safety in Numbers
16.description: If at least 2 allied Heroes are nearby, Fortitude of the Faithful grants an additional 10 Armor, 50% Mana Regeneration per second, and causes Deckard's Basic Abilities to recharge an additional 50% faster.

16.name: Horadric Staff
16.description: Every 5 seconds, Deckard's next Basic Attack Stuns Heroes for 0.75 seconds.

20.name: Respect the Elderly
20.description: Stay Awhile and Listen Silences and Blinds enemies for 3 seconds upon waking up from Sleep.

20.name: Morenados!
20.description: Lorenado gains an additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds every time an enemy Hero is knocked back. This effect can only occur once per 0.5 seconds.

20.name: Bottomless Flask
20.description: After use, Healing Potions recharge after 8 seconds.

20.name: Perfect Gems
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of all Gems to 5 seconds and the cooldown of Horadric Cube by 6 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.DeckardAncientBlessings: Activate Fortitude of the Faithful to empower nearby allied Hero Basic Attacks for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardAncientBlessingsAllyBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds, causing them to deal an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardAncientBlessingsAoEDamage,Amount"/></c> damage in an area and heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardAncientBlessingsHealCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> for each Hero hit. This effect can only occur once per second.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardBottomlessFlask: After use, Healing Potions recharge after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardBottomlessFlask,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardCubeMastery: Reduce the Mana cost of Scroll of Sealing from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,DeckardScrollOfSealing,Cost.Vital[Energy]"Player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,DeckardScrollOfSealing,Cost.Vital[Energy]+Talent,DeckardCubeMastery,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"Player="0"/></c>. Each enemy Hero hit by Horadric Cube reduces the cooldown of Scroll of Sealing by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,DeckardCubeMasteryModifyCooldown,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardFieldStudy: Each enemy Hero hit by Scroll of Sealing grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardFieldStudyBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability] * 100"/>%</c> Spell Power for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardFieldStudyBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardFieldStudyBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability] * Behavior,DeckardFieldStudyBuff,MaxStackCount * 100" precision="4"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardFortitudeOfTheFaithful: When at least <C val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> other allied Hero is nearby, Deckard gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardFortitudeOfTheFaithfulArmor,ArmorModification[0].AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor and his Basic Abilities recharge <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardGemEmerald: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,DeckardHoradricCubeActiveDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Gem].Modifier"/>% </c>and have it reduce the healing received of enemy Heroes by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,DeckardGemEmeraldHealingReduction,Modification.HealTakenAdditiveMultiplier[Life]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardGemEmeraldHealingReduction,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Only <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Gem may be active at a time.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardGemRuby: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,DeckardHoradricCubeActiveDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Gem].Modifier"/>% </c> and it spawns <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Lesser Healing Potions from each enemy Hero hit, healing allied Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardLesserHealingPotionCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> when picked up. Lesser Healing Potions last for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardLesserHealingPotionTimedLife,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Only <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Gem may be active at a time.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardGemSapphire: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,DeckardHoradricCubeActiveDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Gem].Modifier"/>% </c>and its slow by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-(Behavior,DeckardGemSapphireSlow,Modification[0].UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor - Behavior,DeckardHoradricCubeSlow,Modification[0].UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor) * 100"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>Only <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Gem may be active at a time.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardHealingPotion: Throw a Healing Potion on the ground that heals the first allied Hero that comes in contact with it for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardHealingPotionCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c>.<n/><n/>Limit <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardHealingPotionUnitTracker,MaxTrackedUnits" player="0"/></c> active Potions.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardHoradricCubeCharging: Release the Horadric Cube. After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardHoradricCubeReleaseCreatePersistent,ExpireDelay" precision="1" player="0"/></c> seconds it explodes, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardHoradricCubeActiveDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to all enemies in the area and Slowing them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,DeckardHoradricCubeSlow,Modification[0].UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor * 100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardHoradricCubeSlow,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardHoradricStaff: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardHoradricStaffCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds, Deckard's next Basic Attack Stuns Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardHoradricStaffStun,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardKanaisCube: Horadric Cube reduces Hero damage dealt by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardKanaisCubeDamageReduction,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*100*(-1)"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardKanaisCubeDamageReduction,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardLorenado: <c val="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardLorenadoTimedLife,Period" player="0"/></c> second, create a twirling tome tornado that travels towards the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals <c val="#TooltipNumers"><c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardLorenadoImpactDamage,Amount"/></c></c> damage to Heroes hit.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardMorenados: Lorenado gains an additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,DeckardLorenadoMorenadosTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse"/></c> seconds every time an enemy Hero is knocked back. This effect can only occur once per <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardMorenadosCooldown,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardPerfectGems: Reduce the cooldown of all Gems to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and the cooldown of Horadric Cube by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,DeckardPerfectGems,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardPotionOfRevival: When a Healing Potion is picked up, it also heals all nearby allied Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(1+Effect,DeckardHealingPotionPotionOfRevivalCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[PotionOfRevival].Modifier)"/>%</c> of the healing amount.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardPotionOfShielding: Whenever an ally is healed by a Healing Potion, they gain a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardPotionOfShieldingShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> Shield for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardPotionOfShieldingShield,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardRejuvenationPotion: Healing Potions restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardRejuvenationPotionMana,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana and heal for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardRejuvenationPotionHeal,RechargeVitalRate *Behavior,DeckardRejuvenationPotionBuff,Duration * 2 "/></c> over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardRejuvenationPotionBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardRespectTheElderly: Stay Awhile and Listen Silences and Blinds enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardRespectTheElderlyBlind,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds upon waking up from Sleep.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardSafetyInNumbers: If at least <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> allied Heroes are nearby, Fortitude of the Faithful grants an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardSafetyInNumbersArmor,ArmorModification[0].AllArmorBonus-Behavior,DeckardFortitudeOfTheFaithfulArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor, <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,DeckardFortitudeOfTheFaithfulSafetyInNumbersManaRegeneration,Modification.VitalRegenMultiplier[Energy]"/>%</c> Mana Regeneration per second, and causes Deckard's Basic Abilities to recharge an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardScrollOfIdentify: Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with Scroll of Sealing permanently increases its damage by .Reward: After hitting Heroes, Scroll of Sealing reveals and reduces the Armor of Heroes hit by for seconds.Reward: After hitting Heroes, this talent's Armor reduction effect is increased to and its duration to seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardScrollOfSealing: Unfurl an enchanted scroll over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardScrollOfSealingCreatePersistent,ExpireDelay" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds, forming a triangle that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardScrollOfSealingDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies inside and Roots them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardScrollOfSealingRootBehavior,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardScrollOfStoneCurse: Scroll of Sealing deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> more damage when hitting at least <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardScrollOfStoneCurseCaster,MaxStackCount"/></c> Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardStayAWhileAndListen: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,DeckardStayAWhileAndListen,CastIntroTime" player="0" precision="2"/></c> second, Channel for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardStayAWhileAndListenCasterBehavior,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds, putting enemy Heroes in front of Deckard to Sleep while Channeling, and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardStayAWhileAndListenFinalSleepBehavior,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds after.<n/><n/>Enemies can only be put to Sleep once per cast, and Sleep's effects end instantly if they take damage.
tooltipMarkup.DeckardSuperHealingPotion: If a Healing Potion isn't picked up for at least <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DeckardSuperHealingPotionTimer,Duration"/></c> seconds, it heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DeckardSuperHealingPotionCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[SuperHealingPotion].Modifier * 100"/>%</c> more.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Healing Potion heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,DeckardHealingPotionCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[SuperLowHealth].Modifier"/>%</c> more when the target is under <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> health.
